fast_path.transformation: clone repo and copy the nine CSVs from datasets/ into local canonical_9 storage

authoritative_raw_alternatives.WT_ESP_HF: DeepHF pickle arrays require decoding and optional sequence reconstruction
authoritative_raw_alternatives.xCas9_SpCas9_NG_Sniper: Kim 2020 supplement requires trimming 30nt context to 23nt benchmark format and min-max normalization
authoritative_raw_alternatives.HCT116_HELA: Hart 2015 supplement requires extracting guide and fitness columns and mapping to benchmark schema
authoritative_raw_alternatives.HL60: Wang 2014 supplement requires extracting guide and screening values and mapping to benchmark schema

DeepSpCas9_train.transformation: extract 30nt sequences and activity labels; convert to standard CSV schema

CRISPRon_combined.what_is_missing: raw combined training CSV in repo
CRISPRon_combined.transformation: merge new and borrowed guide sets; preserve 30nt context and deltaG feature

cclmoff_compiled.transformation: download processed bundle and normalize file paths into modern primary suite layout

CHANGE-seq.from_source: GEO raw archive plus paper supplement or CHANGE-seq pipeline
CHANGE-seq.transformation: derive processed site-level table from raw archive or extract from supplement

DNABERT-Epi_primary_tables.transformation: extract per-dataset tables and reproduce sgRNA-based folds

legacy_faststart_bundle.transformation: download bundle and unpack sklearn Bunch object for immediate ML inputs
